Notes: Existing RRset has t.campus.edu. A 192.0.2.80 with TTL 300. UPDATE adds a second A RR for the same owner with TTL 5, testing whether the server accepts and normalizes, accepts and preserves, or rejects due to TTL mismatch.

Steps.Description: Add an A RR to an existing RRset with a different TTL than the preexisting member.

Steps.Name: t.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the new RR is present in the RRset after the UPDATE, regardless of TTL normalization.
